name: social
description: Use the social CLI to run LinkedIn outreach, posting, audience insights, inbox triage, account research, and account administration.

interface.shortDescription: Run LinkedIn through the social CLI.
interface.longDescription: Social lets Codex run LinkedIn distribution through the social CLI — search people and posts, read profiles, comments, reactions, companies, jobs, inboxes, and requests, manage connected accounts, and post where enabled. One login, one bill; the agent runs the calls, you stay the decision-maker.
interface.defaultPrompt: Help me use the social CLI for LinkedIn.
